_comment: Cross-provider baseline for the NL->Cypher regression gate against Anthropic. Regenerate with `LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic ANTHROPIC_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5 python -m tests.nl2cypher.eval.runner --config full --with-db` then strip the per-case `results: []` list and copy from `tests/nl2cypher/eval/reports/`. Note: cached_tokens_mean is 0 because Haiku 4.5 requires a 4096-token minimum cacheable prefix and our prompts are ~500 tokens; the AnthropicProvider cache plumbing is separately verified against claude-sonnet-4-5 (1024-token floor) in the ad-hoc smoke test -- call 2 served 2346/2357 input tokens from cache, proving end-to-end cache_read_input_tokens propagation.
